tipRules.tip: Johnston: Drop shot a finesse worm to bed fish alongside flipping worms and creature baits. Use Garmin Perspective Mode and Power-Pole Move trolling motor for targeting bed fish.

Johnston: When the bed fish bite dwindles, flip spatterdock (pads) on the main river. This produced a 7-12 and was the best decision for the final day. Manage your fish well and be willing to pivot to a backup pattern.

knowledge.insight: Johnston: Managed fish well and made good decisions across four days. When the main bed-fishing pattern dwindled on the final day, shifting to flipping pads on the main river was the best decision — it produced the biggest fish of the day.
